story.iWant: slash commands (`/setup`, `/plan`, `/build`, etc.) to invoke workflows
story.soThat: I can use the framework through simple CLI commands

task.name: Create workflow directory structure for all MVP commands
task.subtask: 1.4: Create `.slide-builder/workflows/plan/` directory with placeholder workflow.yaml (smart router)

task.name: Create Claude Code skill registration
task.subtask: 2.4: Create skill registration for `/sb-plan` command (smart router)

task.name: Implement command-to-workflow routing logic
task.subtask: 3.1: Document command → workflow directory mapping in CONVENTIONS.md or workflow registry
3.2: Each skill invokes BMAD workflow execution pattern with corresponding workflow.yaml path
3.3: Workflow executor loads workflow.yaml and instructions.md per Story 1.2 pattern

task.name: Implement error handling for invalid commands
task.subtask: 4.1: Define error message template listing all available commands
4.2: Include brief description of each command in error output
4.3: Ensure error message is helpful and actionable

task.name: Create placeholder workflow.yaml files with proper structure
task.subtask: 5.1: Each workflow.yaml follows BMAD schema: name, description, instructions path
5.2: Include placeholder instructions.md with minimal step structure
5.3: Ensure workflow files are valid YAML and can be loaded

task.name: Integration testing
task.subtask: 6.1: Test each of the 10 commands invokes correct workflow
6.2: Test invalid command shows error with full command list
6.3: Verify workflow.yaml is loaded and instructions.md executed
6.4: Verify extensibility - adding new workflow/command is straightforward

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Given the Slide Builder framework is installed, when the user types `/setup` in Claude Code, then the setup workflow is invoked
Given any registered slash command is entered, when the command is recognized, then the corresponding workflow.yaml is loaded and executed
Unrecognized commands show helpful error with available commands list

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.section: Story 1.4: Slash Command Registration, APIs and Interfaces
doc.snippet: Defines slash command interface mapping commands to workflow directories. Command Router module resolves commands to workflow.yaml paths.

doc.title: Slide Builder Architecture
doc.section: Workflow File Pattern, FR Category to Architecture Mapping
doc.snippet: ADR-001: 100% BMAD pattern alignment. Each command maps to workflow definition following workflow.yaml + instructions.md structure.

doc.title: Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Commands map to workflow directories. Framework extensible for new commands (FR52). Per PRD defines 10 commands for MVP.

artifact.reason: Reference implementation of BMAD workflow.yaml schema from Story 1.2. Use as template for new workflow registrations.
Reference implementation of instructions.md structure. Demonstrates step execution, checkpoints, and ask tags.
State file that workflows read/write. Commands should update status.yaml history on invocation.

frameworks.framework: Runtime environment - skills/workflows executed as Claude Code extensions

constraints.constraint: 100% alignment with BMAD workflow pattern - no custom workflow formats
Each command maps to a workflow definition (workflow.yaml)
Framework is extensible for new workflows/commands
workflow.yaml schema: name, description, instructions path, variables
Workflows should initialize/update status.yaml during execution
Commands prefixed with `sb-` to avoid collision with built-in Claude Code commands

interface.name: workflow.yaml Schema
interface.signature: name: string, description: string, instructions: path, variables: object, template: bool

interface.name: Workflow Execution Pattern
interface.signature: load workflow.yaml → load instructions.md → execute steps in order

tests.standards: Per tech spec Test Strategy: Unit tests verify command-to-workflow mapping. Integration tests type commands and verify workflow execution. Error handling tests verify helpful error messages for invalid commands. Extensibility tests verify adding new workflow/command is straightforward. Manual CLI testing primary method per Epic 1 scope.

locations.location: Manual CLI testing in Claude Code

ideas.idea: Type /sb-setup, verify setup workflow invoked and instructions begin executing
Type each of 10 registered commands, verify correct workflow.yaml loaded
Verify workflow executor parses instructions.md and executes steps in order
Type invalid command like /sb-invalid, verify error lists all available commands with descriptions
Add new workflow directory, verify it becomes accessible via new command
